name: capture_vision
description: Launch a game headless, drive it for a short run, and capture a Vision session: screenshots + state snapshots + telemetry + logs. Returns a session summary plus ABSOLUTE screenshot paths you can Read to see frames.

durationMs.description: How long to drive the run, ms (default decided by the vision pillar).

buildUrl.description: URL of an already-served build (e.g. http://localhost:7072/play/<job>/). If omitted the pillar resolves one.

options.description: Opaque per-game knobs forwarded to the adapter.
